backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a clothing store backend, managing products, carts, orders, user profiles, and static store content with role-based access control distinguishing admin and regular users.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the 'Admin Setup' claim-admin-rights flow to its implementing files (useQueries.ts and Admin.tsx) with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing each file's purpose, styling choices, and key functionality for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS color tokens for light and dark themes using a neutral (zero chroma) palette with destructive and chart color exceptions.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'DHIMAYU STUDIO' that mounts the React app via a root div and module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining eight routes (home, catalog, product, cart, checkout, order confirmation, admin, about) all nested under a Layout root route.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Three-column footer with brand logo, collections list (Cotton Shirts, Graphic T-Shirts), Studio links including Admin Panel, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with desktop category navigation, centered logo, cart icon with item count badge, UserDropdown for auth, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Shell layout rendering Header, Footer, and an Outlet, plus a ProfileSetupModal that appears for authenticated users without a saved profile to trigger the admin email flow.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout, showing appropriate icons and loading state based on authentication status.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a product card with image, name, price, and sizes, including a hover-revealed quick-add-to-cart button with out-of-stock handling.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name to create a profile before continuing.
frontend/src/components/UserDropdown.tsx: A dropdown menu for authenticated users showing their display name, an admin panel link (if applicable), and a logout option; renders a plain login button when unauthenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including products, cart, orders, user profiles, and store content CRUD operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Jost), sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a warm neutral CSS custom property palette for both light and dark modes used by the Dhimayu Studio brand.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting a Tailwind class merger (`cn`), an INR price formatter, and category-related lookup maps (labels, images, slugs) for the four product categories.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page component that fetches store content via a custom hook and renders brand story paragraphs with skeleton loading states and a fallback static copy.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin dashboard page providing full CRUD for products (with client-side image compression via Canvas API) and store content editing, gated behind ICP Internet Identity admin checks.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items with quantity increment/decrement controls and removal, computing line totals and delegating mutations to custom cart hooks.
frontend/src/pages/Catalog.tsx: Product catalog page that reads a category slug from the URL, fetches matching products, and renders a filterable grid with loading skeletons, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page that collects customer name and delivery address, calculates cart subtotal, and places an order via mutation hooks before navigating to order confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page displaying a hero image, brand statement with dynamic store content, and a grid of category cards that navigate to catalog pages; auto-initializes the store if no products exist.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Static confirmation page shown after a successful order, displaying the order reference ID from URL search params and links to return home or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Product detail page that fetches a product by ID, displays its image, size selector, and stock status, and allows adding the item to the cart.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Jost), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations for the project's design system.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features and pending feature requests, specifically around adding admin privilege/access control and a self-promotion flow for the first admin.
